response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and distributed systems. However, he falls significantly short of the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, lacking demonstrated experience with Python, RAG architectures, and vector databases, with his AI exposure seemingly limited to his most recent role.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level engineering experience with strong architectural and full-stack capabilities, particularly in TypeScript and Node.js.
Demonstrated technical leadership, open-source contributions, and experience organizing workshops and tech talks.
Recent exposure to relevant GenAI technologies, specifically Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflows.
concerns: Does not meet the strict requirement of 8+ years of experience developing AI-driven solutions.
No mention of Python, vector databases, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures in the resume.
AI and GenAI experience appears limited exclusively to his most recent, very short-tenured position.
